services.name: Free case consultation
services.description: 30-minute intake call to review your situation

services.name: Wills & estates
services.description: Wills, powers of attorney, and estate planning

faqs.question: Is the consultation really free?
faqs.answer: Yes — the first 30-minute consultation is free with no obligation to retain us.

faqs.question: How much do you charge?
faqs.answer: Fees depend on the case type and complexity, which is exactly what the consultation is for — a lawyer will give you a clear quote afterward.

faqs.question: Do you offer virtual meetings?
faqs.answer: Yes, consultations can be in person or by video call.
